events.title: Welding & CNC Plasma Cutter Workshop
events.description:
Discover the art of welding at Machyne Makerspace! 




Join our welding workshop and craft a set of unique bookends, perfect for both beginners and experienced welders. 
What You’ll Learn and Do: 
Metal Fabrication: Master basic techniques, including cutting square tube stock using a cold saw, chop saw, and angle grinder. 
MIG Welding: Experience hands-on MIG welding with a Lincoln Electric Easy MIG 180, practicing tack welds and beads. 
Finishing Skills: Get tips on fixing materials, cleaning

events.title: March Madness Watch Party
events.description:
Get ready for the best time of the year at The AMP! 🏀 
Join us March 17 through April 6 as we stream all the tournament action on the big screens. Grab your crew, order from your favorite AMP vendors, and catch every buzzer-beater, upset, and bracket-buster with us. 
We’ll have food and drink specials, games, and entertainment throughout the tournament — plus live DJ sets on March 20, March 27, April 3, and April 6 to keep the energy high between matchups. 
Basketball. Food. Fun.

events.title: March Madness Kickoff Party
events.description:
THIS EVENT IS OPEN TO LAUNCH FISHERS MEMBERS ONLY. 
The madness begins on Thursday March 19th with the NCAA’s First Round of games! 🏀 📺 So come kick back, watch the games, and enjoy a free lunch on us! We’ll have the games streaming with food and drinks served.

events.title: Free Cowork Friday: March 2026
events.description:
One Friday a month, we open our doors to anyone interested in trying out coworking! Potential new members can come in and enjoy free coffee & coworking as they test drive what a Launch Fishers membership is all about. We provide a reliable place to work for all sorts of people: entrepreneurs, remote workers, consultants, and more! 
Benefits of Launch Fishers membership: a comfortable workspace, a great community of fellow coworkers, phone booths, meeting & conference rooms, in-house coffee shop,

events.title: LEARN AT LAUNCH | FUSION: Leading Multigenerational Teams
events.description:
Stop managing the gap and start leading the “fusion.” 
In today’s workforce, it’s common to have multiple generations working side-by-side. From Baby Boomers to Gen Z, each group brings a unique worldview, communication style, and set of expectations. For small businesses and entrepreneurs, mastering this dynamic isn’t just a “nice-to-have.” It’s the key to scaling a cohesive team. 
Join us for March’s Learn at Launch as we welcome Mitch Isaacs, Executive Director of the Shafer Leadership Academ

events.title: Upcoming events.
events.description: Why do some investors consistently make better calls—especially when decisions are fast, uncertain, and high-stakes? Research suggests the answer isn’t only experience or pattern recognition, but when those decisions are made. This workshop draws on Regan Stevenson’s research to examine how subtle and other unexpected drivers, such as investors’ biological timing preferences, influence risk tolerance, judgment quality, and investment outcomes.

events.title: Does Timing Create Better Investors? What Biological Timing Reveals About Investment Decisions
events.description: Why do some investors consistently make better calls—especially when decisions are fast, uncertain, and high-stakes? Research suggests the answer isn’t only experience or pattern recognition, but when those decisions are made. This workshop draws on Regan Stevenson’s research to examine how subtle and other unexpected drivers, such as investors’ biological timing preferences, influence risk tolerance, judgment quality, and investment outcomes.

events.title: Indy.rb - The Indianapolis Ruby Brigade Monthly Meetup
events.description:
Indyrb - Indianapolis Ruby Brigade
Join us to talk about Ruby, work projects, hack on something, or just get a drink or bite & enjoy the company.

We are mixing it up again and meeting this month at The Ale Emporium Castleton location
8617 Allisonville Rd
Indianapolis, 46250
